steps.title: Set the underlined sentence in context
steps.content: Sentence 1 is a generalization: every member of a boat crew thinks he is doing all the work. The underlined sentence then describes Harris's particular version of this conviction.

steps.title: Identify the rhetorical relationship
steps.content:
After the underlined sentence, George is also given as another instance — so Harris is one of multiple specific examples of the trend the narrator just described.

A, B, and C misread the sentence (it's not about resolving conflict or being puzzled). D correctly identifies it as a specific example illustrating the narrator's general observation. D is correct.
